title: Copper Trident
description: This specific resource pack completely changes the default look of the standard trident, making it a brand new, stylish copper version
body:
This specific resource pack completely changes the default look of the standard trident, making it a brand new, stylish copper version!
[Copper Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc106b9766e926460bf0b3f305e17620f78d770f.png)
